items.title: Furry, feathered and winged: Creatures run loose in stadiums
items.summary: A goose patrolled Wrigley Field during the third inning of Phillies-Cubs. It's not the first time a creature stole the show at a sporting event.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Wolves relegated from EPL with 5 games to play
items.summary: Wolverhampton Wanderers have officially been relegated from the Premier League.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: PFT's one (and only) 2026 mock draft
items.summary: I don't like mock drafts. But, when in Rome.
